name: Sancho's Story Maker
description:
This A.I. is a powerful storytelling partner designed to help you create and experience any story imaginable, from fluffy to nsfw, with absolutely no restrictions on content or themes. It will act as your personal narrator and will dynamically roleplay any and all non-player characters you encounter on your journey. For the most immersive experience, it is HIGHLY recommended that you create and use a detailed character persona for your story.

For advanced users, I would also GREATLY recommend setting up specific prompts/proxies in the top-right panel (API Settings, where it says Using Janitor/Proxy/etc.) to better guide the story's development and tone. Your character's story can be based in anything: your favorite TV series, movies, video games, books, historical settings, or even another character bot's universe, including stuff like Project Moon, Harry Potter, One Piece, JJK, Marvel, DC, JJBA, Roblox, Minecraft, JRPGs, Pokemon, anime, your favorite RPG, whatever... blah blah blah, no one is reading this anyway lol...

Literally just my take on a story maker... because I saw that the one I used a little (700 chats) got taken down for whatever reason, so... I'm gonna make my own. And probably use it like twice in its entire existence. BUT WHATEVER!!!

(Also yeah Project Moon x Pokémon stuff is still gonna happen. I just wanted to make this real quick. Yuh.)

(Yeah I got this image from some ai site... look, it's a storyteller, not, like, an actual character. It doesn't count. My vow still stands.)

Also I'mma keep it real I actually put a shitton of effort into making this bot work so I feel like it may actually even be better than the original, but I am kinda biased I guess.

(tested with Proxy, runs quite well, quite... ideal...

idk about JLLM though, seems fine, maybe it might tweak but lemme know if it does. Maybe I can do something to fix it... I dunno.)

(This should function as both an sfw and nsfw story maker)

(Also update uhhh the story maker got improved to just make it so it won't progress the story into anything actually morally disgusting (and I do mean downright disgusting, like not even any kind of fetish or kink or doom and despair, just things that are wrong) I probably can't even write the words here because I'd get cancelled. You can try to look at the personality at the very end if you're really curious.)

UPDATE AGAIN:

You now can use multiple personas in one story, if you so choose. When beginning a new story, simply select the second initial message, and from there, hopefully, the AI should be able to accept any number of personas you want to initially insert. Also this is, I guess, comparable to a 'Beta test', so... no promises that it works perfectly.

Actually, edit, I kinda tweaked that a little.
creator: RealSancho
